Bash("C:\\PythonProjects\\vibeFund\\fix_ctx.ps1" << 'PSEOF'
$files = @\(
  'C:\\PythonProjects\\vibeFund\\apps\\web\\src\\app\\api\\v1\\projects\\[id]\\route.ts',
  'C:\\PythonProjects\\vibeFund\\apps\\web\\src\\app\\api\\v1\\projects\\[id]\\funding\\route.ts',
  'C:\\PythonProjects\\vibeFund\\apps\\web\\src\\app\\api\\v1\\projects\\[id]\\rewards\\route.ts',
  'C:\\PythonProjects\\vibeFund\\apps\\web\\src\\app\\api\\v1\\projects\\[id]\\rewards\\[rewardId]\\route.ts',
  'C:\\PythonProjects\\vibeFund\\apps\\web\\src\\app\\api\\v1\\projects\\[id]\\comments\\route.ts',
  'C:\\PythonProjects\\vibeFund\\apps\\web\\src\\app\\api\\v1\\projects\\[id]\\updates\\route.ts',
  'C:\\PythonProjects\\vibeFund\\apps\\web\\src\\app\\api\\v1\\comments\\[id]\\route.ts',
  'C:\\PythonProjects\\vibeFund\\apps\\web\\src\\app\\api\\v1\\updates\\[id]\\route.ts',
  'C:\\PythonProjects\\vibeFund\\apps\\web\\src\\app\\api\\v1\\admin\\users\\[id]\\route.ts',
  'C:\\PythonProjects\\vibeFund\\apps\\web\\src\\app\\api\\v1\\admin\\projects\\[id]\\approval\\route.ts',
  'C:\\PythonProjects\\vibeFund\\apps\\web\\src\\app\\api\\v1\\admin\\comments\\[id]\\route.ts'
\)

foreach \($f in $files\) {
  $content = Get-Content -LiteralPath $f -Raw
  # type Ctx = ... 줄 전체 제거 \(빈 줄 하나도 제거\)
  $content = $content -replace '\(?m\)^type Ctx = \\{[^\\n]*\\}\\r?\\n', ''
  # { params }: Ctx  →  { params }  \(변수명 캡처 후 치환\)
  $content = $content -replace '\\{\\s*\(\\w+\)\\s*\\}\\s*:\\s*Ctx', '{ $1 }'
  Set-Content -LiteralPath $f -Value $content -NoNewline
  Write-Host \('Processed: ' + $f\)
}
PSEOF)

Bash("C:\\PythonProjects\\vibeFund\\verify_ctx.ps1" << 'PSEOF'
$files = @\(
  'C:\\PythonProjects\\vibeFund\\apps\\web\\src\\app\\api\\v1\\projects\\[id]\\route.ts',
  'C:\\PythonProjects\\vibeFund\\apps\\web\\src\\app\\api\\v1\\projects\\[id]\\funding\\route.ts',
  'C:\\PythonProjects\\vibeFund\\apps\\web\\src\\app\\api\\v1\\projects\\[id]\\rewards\\route.ts',
  'C:\\PythonProjects\\vibeFund\\apps\\web\\src\\app\\api\\v1\\projects\\[id]\\rewards\\[rewardId]\\route.ts',
  'C:\\PythonProjects\\vibeFund\\apps\\web\\src\\app\\api\\v1\\projects\\[id]\\comments\\route.ts',
  'C:\\PythonProjects\\vibeFund\\apps\\web\\src\\app\\api\\v1\\projects\\[id]\\updates\\route.ts',
  'C:\\PythonProjects\\vibeFund\\apps\\web\\src\\app\\api\\v1\\comments\\[id]\\route.ts',
  'C:\\PythonProjects\\vibeFund\\apps\\web\\src\\app\\api\\v1\\updates\\[id]\\route.ts',
  'C:\\PythonProjects\\vibeFund\\apps\\web\\src\\app\\api\\v1\\admin\\users\\[id]\\route.ts',
  'C:\\PythonProjects\\vibeFund\\apps\\web\\src\\app\\api\\v1\\admin\\projects\\[id]\\approval\\route.ts',
  'C:\\PythonProjects\\vibeFund\\apps\\web\\src\\app\\api\\v1\\admin\\comments\\[id]\\route.ts'
\)

Write-Host '=== Verification: checking for remaining type Ctx or }: Ctx ==='
foreach \($f in $files\) {
  $content = Get-Content -LiteralPath $f -Raw
  $hasCtxType = $content -match 'type Ctx'
  $hasCtxAnnotation = $content -match '\\}\\s*:\\s*Ctx'
  $label = Split-Path \(Split-Path $f -Parent\) -Leaf
  if \($hasCtxType -or $hasCtxAnnotation\) {
    Write-Host \('  [REMAINING] ' + $label\)
  } else {
    Write-Host \('  [OK] ' + $label\)
  }
}

Write-Host ''
Write-Host '=== Spot-check: projects [id] route.ts function signatures ==='
$sample = Get-Content -LiteralPath 'C:\\PythonProjects\\vibeFund\\apps\\web\\src\\app\\api\\v1\\projects\\[id]\\route.ts' -Raw
$sample | Select-String -Pattern 'async.*\\{.*\\}' -AllMatches | ForEach-Object { $_.Matches } | ForEach-Object { Write-Host \('  ' + $_.Value\) }
PSEOF)
